```{r}
  mutate(group = case_when(predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


toplot = gutmags %>%
  mutate(geographic_group= replace_na(geographic_group, "Unknown")) %>%
  mutate(geographic_group= gsub("^$", "Unknown", geographic_group)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(geographic_group) %>%
  mutate(total=n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(posorneg = case_when(manual_ktyp == "K_pos" ~ "K_pos",
                              TRUE ~ "K_neg")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(geographic_group, total, posorneg) %>%
  summarise(count=n()) %>%
  ungroup() 


pdf(paste0(plotdir,"ED7C_gutmags_kps+_geography.pdf"),width = 7,height=3.5)
ggplot(toplot,aes(x=reorder(geographic_group, count),y=count,fill=posorneg,label=count)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black") +
   geom_text(aes(y = total+150, label =total),
            size = 5,
            color = "black",#fontface="bold",
            check_overlap = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values =c("white","grey"), label = c("-","+")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,1780)) +
  theme(legend.position="bottom",
        axis.text.x=element_text(angle=60,hjust=1)) +
  labs(y = "# genomes", x= "", fill="Capsule") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(hjust=0.5, size =15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size =15),
        legend.position="inside",
        legend.text = element_text(size=16,face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(size=16,face = "bold"),
        axis.title=element_text(size=15))

dev.off()


gutmags %>%
   mutate(posorneg = case_when(manual_ktyp == "K_pos" ~ "K_pos",
                              TRUE ~ "K_neg")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(posorneg) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count=n())

```



#### ED7D - MAGs vs genomes (healthy vs disease phylogroups) - only in stool
Same data as 4D (GLM)

```{r}
# ncbi isolates (subset)
ncbi_analysis = read.xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"ncbi_annotated_derep_260112.xlsx")) %>% 
  filter(host_group=="Human" & host_common_name == "Human" & !(isolation_source %in% c("Food","Probiotic","Sewage and wastewater","Meat","Plant"))) %>%
  filter(isolation_source %in% c("Blood", "Brain and CSF") | host_health %in% c("Bloodstream Infection","Meningitis", "neonatal bacteremia","Healthy")) %>%
  mutate(expec = case_when(host_health != "Healthy" ~ 1,
                           TRUE ~ 0)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(predicted, host_gender, host_age, mlst, geographic_group, phylogroup,o_type,h_type, expec, group)

# add healthy gut mags
gutmags = readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"gutmags_annotated_metad_ectyper.xlsx")) %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(predicted %in% c("No KpsC identified", "No K-type assigned") ~ predicted,
                           TRUE ~ group),
         expec = 0,
         phylogroup = case_when(phylogroup == "C_original" ~"C",
                                TRUE ~ phylogroup)) %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
   dplyr::select(predicted, host_gender, host_age, mlst, geographic_group, phylogroup,o_type,h_type, expec, group)

# add egli
egli = readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"egli_annotated_metad_ectyper.xlsx")) %>%
  filter(invasiveness == "invasive") %>%
  mutate(expec = 1) %>%
   dplyr::select(predicted, host_gender, host_age, mlst, geographic_group, phylogroup,o_type,h_type, expec, group)


totest = gdata::combine(ncbi_analysis, gutmags, egli) %>%
  filter(phylogroup != "NA") %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(predicted == "K_neg_partial" | group %in% c("No K-type assigned","No KpsC identified") ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group),
         phylogroup = case_when(phylogroup == "C_original" ~"C",
                                TRUE ~ phylogroup))


toplot = totest %>%
  dplyr::group_by(phylogroup, expec) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total=n()) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(group,total, phylogroup,expec) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = n()) %>%
  mutate(proportion = (count/total)*100)


mycolors = c(
  "G2A" = "#71B7E2",
  "G2B" = "#345C7B",
  "G3A" = "#7653AB",
  "G3B" = "#A48DCC",
  "kps -" = "grey"
)



# Initialize results dataframe
stat_results <- totest %>%
  dplyr::group_by(phylogroup) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    p_value = ifelse(n_distinct(group) > 1, # Check if more than one group exists
                     fisher.test(table(group, expec))$p.value, 
                     NA)  # Assign NA if only one group present
  )

# Adjust p-values for multiple comparisons
stat_results$p_adjusted <- p.adjust(stat_results$p_value, method = "bonferroni")

# Convert p-values into significance labels
stat_results$significance <- case_when(
  is.na(stat_results$p_value) ~ "ns",
  stat_results$p_adjusted < 0.001 ~ "***",
  stat_results$p_adjusted < 0.01  ~ "**",
  stat_results$p_adjusted < 0.05  ~ "*",
  TRUE ~ "ns"
)

# Merge significance results into the plotting data
toplot <- left_join(toplot, stat_results, by = "phylogroup")



toplot$phylogroup <- factor(toplot$phylogroup, levels=c("A","B1","C","E1","E2","G","B2-1","B2-2","D1","D2","D3","F"))
stat_results$phylogroup <- factor(stat_results$phylogroup, levels=c("A","B1","C","E1","E2","G","B2-1","B2-2","D1","D2","D3","F"))
toplot$expec <- factor(toplot$expec, levels=c(0,1))

pdf(paste0(plotdir,"ED7D_phylogroup_group_percent_includingKneg_NCBIandcommensals_onlyInvasiveasDisease_plusEgli.pdf"), width = 14, height = 3.5)

ggplot(toplot , aes(x = expec, y = proportion, fill = group, label = count)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = mycolors, guide = guide_legend(ncol = 1), na.value = "grey") +
  geom_text(aes(y = proportion),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 5, 
            color = "black",
            check_overlap = TRUE) + 
  labs(y = "% genomes", x = "", fill = "Capsule Group") +
  
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("A", "I")) +
  facet_grid(~ phylogroup) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.position = "none") +
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.5, y = 100 + 10, label = significance), 
            size = 5, inherit.aes = FALSE, data = stat_results)

 dev.off()



```


#### ED7E-G - Simpson's diversity, richness and evenness
same data as S5D.
```{r}

# Filter phylogroups with ≥25 genomes in both asymptomatic and invasive
valid_phylogroups <- totest %>%
  count(phylogroup, expec) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = expec, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  filter(`0` >= 25,`1` >= 25) %>%
  pull(phylogroup)

# Apply filter to main data
totest <- totest %>%
  filter(phylogroup %in% valid_phylogroups)


library(vegan)

# Calculate diversity metrics
diversity_data <- totest %>%
  dplyr::group_by(phylogroup, expec, predicted) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = predicted, values_from = count, values_fill = 0) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    counts_vec = list(c_across(-c(phylogroup, expec))),
    richness = sum(counts_vec > 0),
    simpson = diversity(counts_vec, index = "simpson"),
    simpson_inverse = diversity(counts_vec, index = "invsimpson"),
    evenness_simpson = ifelse(richness > 1, simpson_inverse / richness, NA)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(phylogroup, expec, richness, simpson_inverse, evenness_simpson)

# Count unique entries per disease group
n_labels <- totest %>% 
  filter(predicted != "K_neg_partial") %>%
  mutate(phylogroup = case_when(phylogroup == "C_original" ~"C",
                                TRUE ~ phylogroup)) %>%
  mutate(expec = dplyr::recode(expec, `0` = "A", `1` = "I")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(expec) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(label = paste0("n = ", n))

# Long format for plotting
diversity_long <- diversity_data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(richness, simpson_inverse, evenness_simpson),
               names_to = "metric",
               values_to = "value") %>%
  filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
  mutate(
    expec = dplyr::recode(expec, `0` = "A", `1` = "I"),
    expec = factor(expec, levels = c("A", "I")),
    metric = factor(metric, levels = c("richness", "simpson_inverse", "evenness_simpson"),
                    labels = c("Richness",
                               "Simpson Diversity Index",
                               "Evenness"))
  )

# Repeat n_labels for each metric panel
metrics <- levels(diversity_long$metric)
n_labels_plot <- tidyr::expand_grid(metric = metrics, n_labels)


num_colors <- n_distinct(diversity_long$phylogroup) 
palette_colors <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(12, "Set1"))(num_colors) 

# separate nasty and nice phylogroups
diversity_long = diversity_long %>% 
  mutate(phylogroup = case_when(phylogroup == "C_original" ~"C",
                                TRUE ~ phylogroup))


pdf(paste0(plotdir,"ED7E_diversitySimpson.pdf"), width =3, height = 2.5)

div_metric = "Simpson Diversity Index"

ggplot(diversity_long %>% filter(metric == div_metric), aes(x = expec, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.3,
               position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = phylogroup,color = phylogroup),
            position = position_dodge(0.15)) +
  geom_point(aes(group = phylogroup,color = phylogroup), size = 2.5,
             position = position_dodge(0.15)) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = phylogroup,color = phylogroup),
                  size = 3.5,
                  position = position_dodge(0.1),
                  show.legend = FALSE,
                  max.overlaps = 20) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 5) + 
  scale_color_manual(values=palette_colors) +
  geom_text(data = n_labels_plot,
    aes(x = expec, y = 16, label = label),
    inherit.aes = F, check_overlap = T, 
    #vjust = -3.5,
    size = 4) +
  labs(x = "",y = div_metric) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12),
        strip.text = element_blank())

dev.off()



#### Richness
pdf(paste0(plotdir,"ED7F_Richness.pdf"), width = 3, height = 2.5)

div_metric = "Richness"

ggplot(diversity_long %>% filter(metric == div_metric), aes(x = expec, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.3,
               position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = phylogroup,color = phylogroup),
            position = position_dodge(0.15)) +
  geom_point(aes(group = phylogroup,color = phylogroup), size = 2.5,
             position = position_dodge(0.15)) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = phylogroup,color = phylogroup),
                  size = 3.5,
                  position = position_dodge(0.1),
                  show.legend = FALSE,
                  max.overlaps = 10) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 5) + 
  scale_color_manual(values=palette_colors) +
  geom_text(
    data = n_labels_plot,
    aes(x = expec, y = 31, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, check_overlap = T,
    #vjust = -3.5,
    size = 4
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Richness") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12))


dev.off()


pdf(paste0(plotdir,"ED7G_Evenness.pdf"), width = 3, height = 2.5)

div_metric = "Evenness"

ggplot(diversity_long %>% filter(metric == div_metric), aes(x = expec, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.3,
               position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = phylogroup,color = phylogroup),
            position = position_dodge(0.1)) +
  geom_point(aes(group = phylogroup,color = phylogroup), size = 2.5,
             position = position_dodge(0.1)) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = phylogroup,color = phylogroup),
                  size = 3.5,
                  position = position_dodge(0.1),
                  show.legend = FALSE,
                  max.overlaps = 10) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0,0.2,0.4,0.6), limits = c(0,0.7)) + 
  scale_color_manual(values=palette_colors) +
  geom_text(
    data = n_labels_plot,
    aes(x = expec, y = 0.65, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, check_overlap = T,
    size = 4) +
  labs(x = "",y = "Evenness") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12))


dev.off()
```



#### ED7H - distribution of Ktypes per isolation source

Same data as 4C.
###### left with K-neg

```{r}

### prep ncbi data
ncbi_analysis = read.xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"ncbi_annotated_derep_260112.xlsx")) %>% 
  filter(host_group == "Human" & host_common_name == "Human" & !(isolation_source %in% c("Food","Probiotic","Sewage and wastewater","Meat","Plant"))) %>%
  mutate(isolation_source = case_when(!(isolation_source %in% c("Stool","Urine and bladder", "Blood","Brain and CSF")) ~ "Other body sites",
                                      TRUE ~ isolation_source),
         host_health = case_when(host_health %in% c("asymptomatic bacteriuria", "Urinary Tract Infection", "recurrent uti") | isolation_source == "Urine and bladder" ~ "UTI",
                                 host_health %in% c("Bloodstream Infection", "neonatal bacteremia") | isolation_source == "Blood" ~ "BSI",
                                 host_health %in% c("Meningitis") | isolation_source == "Brain and CSF" ~ "Meningitis",
                                 host_health %in% c("GI Tract and Diarrhoea", "HUS and TTP", "STEC/Shigella/EHEC") ~ "InPEC",
                                 host_health == "Healthy" & isolation_source == "Stool" ~ "Healthy (stool)",
                                 host_health == "Healthy" & isolation_source != "Stool"~ "Healthy (other)",
                                 TRUE ~ "Other disease")) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  #add genome id column for merging with other datasets - after dereplication we didn't have it anymore
  mutate(genome_id = row_number(),
        group = case_when(predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group)) %>%
  dplyr::select(genome_id, predicted, host_health,host_age,geographic_group, host_gender, group)


# prep healthy gut MAGs
gutmags = readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"gutmags_annotated_metad_ectyper.xlsx")) %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(predicted %in% c("No KpsC identified", "No K-type assigned") ~ predicted,
                           predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group),
         phylogroup = case_when(phylogroup == "C_original" ~"C",
                                TRUE ~ phylogroup)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
   dplyr::select(genome_id,predicted, host_health,host_age, host_gender, geographic_group, group) %>%
    mutate(host_health = "MAGs")



# prep egli collection
egli = readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"egli_annotated_metad_ectyper.xlsx")) %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group),
         host_health = case_when(invasiveness=="invasive" ~ "BSI",
                                                 TRUE ~ "UTI")) %>%
  dplyr::select(predicted, host_gender, host_health,host_age,geographic_group, group)


common_cols <- intersect(intersect(names(ncbi_analysis), names(egli)), names(gutmags))
totest_invasive <- gdata::combine(ncbi_analysis[common_cols], egli[common_cols], gutmags[common_cols])



leftpanel <- totest_invasive %>%
  group_by(host_health) %>%
  mutate(total = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(predicted, total, host_health) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(proportion = (count / total) * 100) %>%
  mutate(predicted = case_when(proportion > 2 ~ predicted,
                               TRUE ~ "Other")) %>%
  group_by(host_health, predicted) %>%
  summarise(count = sum(count), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(host_health) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(count),
         proportion = (count / total) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

rightpanel <- totest_invasive %>%
  filter(predicted != "K_neg_partial") %>%
  mutate(predicted = gsub("K54_96", "K96", predicted)) %>%
  group_by(host_health) %>%
  mutate(total = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(predicted, total, host_health) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(proportion = (count / total) * 100) %>%
  mutate(predicted = case_when(proportion > 4 ~ predicted,
                               TRUE ~ "Other")) %>%
  group_by(host_health, predicted) %>%
  summarise(count = sum(count), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(host_health) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(count),
         proportion = (count / total) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()


#take color mapping from S4B
color_mapping <- readRDS(paste0(outputdir,"Ktype_color_mapping.rds"))
color_mapping <- c(color_mapping[names(color_mapping) %in% unique(c(leftpanel$predicted, rightpanel$predicted))],
                   K_neg_partial = "white")

# Define consistent K-type order
all_predicted <- union(leftpanel$predicted,rightpanel$predicted)
core_ktypes <- setdiff(all_predicted, c("K_neg_partial", "Other"))
predicted_levels <- c(sort(core_ktypes), "Other", "K_neg_partial")

# Apply to both panels
leftpanel$predicted <- factor(leftpanel$predicted, levels = predicted_levels)
rightpanel$predicted <- factor(rightpanel$predicted, levels = predicted_levels)




leftpanel$host_health <- factor(leftpanel$host_health, levels=rev(c("MAGs","Healthy (stool)","Healthy (other)","InPEC","UTI","BSI","Meningitis","Other disease")))


pdf(paste0(plotdir,"ED7H_left_K_type_disease.pdf"), width = 7, height = 3)

totals <- leftpanel %>%
  group_by(host_health) %>%
  summarise(total_count = sum(count), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(leftpanel, aes(x = host_health, y = proportion, fill = predicted, label = count)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color="grey30",linewidth = 0.15) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_mapping) +  
  labs(y = "% genomes", x = "", fill = "K-type") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,25,50,75,100), limits=c(0,110)) +
  geom_text(data = totals, aes(x = host_health, y = 107, label = total_count),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,nudge_y = -3,
            size = 4.5, hjust = 0.2) +
  theme_classic() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 17),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 17),
        legend.position = "none")
    
dev.off()



```

##### right without K-neg

```{r}

rightpanel$host_health <- factor(rightpanel$host_health, levels=rev(c("MAGs","Healthy (stool)",
                                                                                "Healthy (other)","InPEC",
                                                                                "UTI","BSI","Meningitis",
                                                                                "Other disease")))


pdf(paste0(plotdir,"ED7H_right_K_type_disease_onlyKpos.pdf"), width = 9, height = 3)

# Calculate total counts per bar (disease + phylogroup)
totals <- rightpanel %>%
  group_by(host_health) %>%
  summarise(total_count = sum(count), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(rightpanel, aes(x = host_health, y = proportion, fill = predicted, label = count)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color="grey30",linewidth = 0.15) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_mapping) +  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,25,50,75,100), limits=c(0,110)) +
  geom_text(data = totals, aes(x = host_health, y = 107, label = total_count),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,nudge_y = -3,
            size = 4.5, hjust = 0.2) +
  labs(y = expression(paste("% ", italic("kps"), "+ genomes")), x= "", fill="K-type") +
  theme_classic() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 17),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 17),
        legend.text=element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title=element_text(size = 14),
        legend.key.height = unit(7, "mm"),
        legend.key.width = unit(7, "mm"),
        legend.position = "right") + guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 3))



dev.off()



```


## ED Fig. 8

##### prep data - same as fig. 4C
NCBI + Egli + gutmags

```{r}
### prep ncbi data
ncbi_analysis = read.xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"ncbi_annotated_derep_260112.xlsx")) %>% 
  filter(host_group == "Human" & host_common_name == "Human" & !(isolation_source %in% c("Food","Probiotic","Sewage and wastewater","Meat","Plant"))) %>%
  mutate(isolation_source = case_when(!(isolation_source %in% c("Stool","Urine and bladder", "Blood","Brain and CSF")) ~ "Other body sites",
                                      TRUE ~ isolation_source),
         host_health = case_when(host_health %in% c("asymptomatic bacteriuria", "Urinary Tract Infection", "recurrent uti") | isolation_source == "Urine and bladder" ~ "UTI",
                                 host_health %in% c("Bloodstream Infection", "neonatal bacteremia") | isolation_source == "Blood" ~ "BSI",
                                 host_health %in% c("Meningitis") | isolation_source == "Brain and CSF" ~ "Meningitis",
                                 host_health %in% c("GI Tract and Diarrhoea", "HUS and TTP", "STEC/Shigella/EHEC") ~ "InPEC",
                                 host_health == "Healthy" & isolation_source == "Stool" ~ "Healthy (stool)",
                                 host_health == "Healthy" & isolation_source != "Stool"~ "Healthy (other)",
                                 TRUE ~ "Other disease")) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  mutate(genome_id = row_number(),
        group = case_when(predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group)) 

# prep healthy gut MAGs
gutmags = readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"gutmags_annotated_metad_ectyper.xlsx")) %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(predicted %in% c("No KpsC identified", "No K-type assigned") ~ predicted,
                           predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group),
         phylogroup = case_when(phylogroup == "C_original" ~"C",
                                TRUE ~ phylogroup)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    mutate(host_health = "MAGs")


# prep egli collection
egli = readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"egli_annotated_metad_ectyper.xlsx")) %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group),
         host_health = case_when(invasiveness=="invasive" ~ "BSI",
                                                 TRUE ~ "UTI"))


common_cols <- intersect(intersect(names(ncbi_analysis), names(egli)), names(gutmags))
totest <- gdata::combine(ncbi_analysis[common_cols], egli[common_cols], gutmags[common_cols])

totest = totest %>%
  filter(mlst !="-")

totest %>% group_by(source) %>%
  summarise(count=n())
```

### ED8A - ST representative vs K-type

```{r}

toplot = totest %>%
  filter(group != "kps -" & phylogroup != "NA" & predicted != "K_neg_partial" & mlst != "-") %>%
  ungroup()

# for text
toplot %>% group_by(source) %>% summarise(n())

toplot =toplot %>%
  dplyr::group_by(predicted) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(no_genomes = n(),
                   no_mlst = n_distinct(mlst)) %>%
  distinct(predicted, group, no_genomes, no_mlst)

mycolors = c(
  "G2A" = "#71B7E2",
  "G2B" = "#345C7B",
  "G3A" = "#7653AB",
  "G3B" = "#A48DCC",
  "kps -" = "grey"
)

pdf(paste0(plotdir,"ED8A_sequencetype_genomes_ktypes_onKtypeside_ncbi_egli_gut.pdf"),width = 4,height = 3)

ggplot(toplot, aes(x=no_genomes,y = no_mlst)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = group), pch=21,size =2, alpha=0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = mycolors) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans="log2") + 
  geom_text_repel(data = toplot %>% filter(no_genomes > 240),
                  aes(label = predicted, color = group),size = 4, max.overlaps = 10, min.segment.length = 3, fontface="bold") +
  scale_color_manual(values = mycolors) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y = "# STs / K-type", x = "#genomes / K-type") +
  guides(alpha="none", fill="none", color="none")

dev.off()

```

### ED8B - capsule diversity within ST (Shannon, Simpson)

```{r}
library(forcats)

div_ST <- totest %>%
  filter(group != "kps -" & phylogroup != "NA" & predicted != "K_neg_partial" & mlst != "-")

div_ST %>% group_by(source) %>%
  summarise(n())

div_ST = div_ST %>%
  count(mlst, predicted) %>%
  group_by(mlst) %>%
  mutate(p = n / sum(n)) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genomes = sum(n),
    shannon = -sum(p * log(p + 1e-12)),
    simpson = 1 - sum(p^2),
    eff_k = exp(shannon),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_genomes >= 20) %>%
  arrange(desc(shannon)) %>%
  mutate(
    mlst_label = paste0("ST", mlst, " (n=", n_genomes, ")"),
    mlst_label = fct_reorder(mlst_label, shannon)
  )

pdf(paste0(plotdir, "ED8B_ST_capsule_diversity_shannon.pdf"),width = 9,height = 3)

ggplot(div_ST, aes(x = reorder(mlst_label,-shannon), y = shannon)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1)) +
  labs(x = "Sequence type (ST)", y = "Shannon diversity (K-type)")

dev.off()



```


### ED8C - ST vs capsule heatmap

```{r}
#remove STs with <20 genomes and kps-neg genomes
st_counts <- totest %>%
  #filter(mlst != "-" & predicted != "K_neg_partial") %>%
  filter(group != "kps -" & phylogroup != "NA" & predicted != "K_neg_partial" & mlst != "-") %>%
  count(mlst, name = "n") %>% arrange(desc(n))

st_keep <- st_counts %>%
  filter(n >= 20) %>%
  pull(mlst)

panelA <- totest %>%
  #filter(mlst != "-" & predicted != "K_neg_partial") %>%
  filter(group != "kps -" & phylogroup != "NA" & predicted != "K_neg_partial" & mlst != "-" & mlst %in% st_keep) 


caps_counts <- panelA %>% count(predicted, name = "n") %>% arrange(desc(n))
caps_keep <- caps_counts %>%
  #here cutoff on number of genoms per capsules - unused
  #filter(n >= 30) %>%
  pull(predicted)

panelA <- panelA %>%
  mutate(capsule_plot = if_else(predicted %in% caps_keep, predicted, "Other"))

panelA %>% group_by(source) %>%
  summarise(n())

# get ST sample sizes for plot
st_n <- panelA %>%
  count(mlst, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(mlst = as.character(mlst))
st_n_vec <- setNames(st_n$n, st_n$mlst)

# row-normalized proportions (ST rows sum to 1)
tab_A <- panelA %>%
  count(mlst, capsule_plot, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(mlst) %>%
  mutate(p = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

mat_A <- tab_A %>%
  select(mlst, capsule_plot, p) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = capsule_plot, values_from = p, values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("mlst") %>%
  as.matrix()

# remove all-zero rows/cols
mat_A <- mat_A[rowSums(mat_A) > 0, colSums(mat_A) > 0, drop = FALSE]


rownames(mat_A) <- paste0(
  "ST", rownames(mat_A),
  " (n=", st_n_vec[rownames(mat_A)], ")"
)

# Annotate capsules with groups
Kgroups <- readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(inputdir, "subgroups.xlsx"))

caps <- colnames(mat_A)

ha_caps <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  df = data.frame(capsule_plot = caps) %>%
    left_join(Kgroups %>% dplyr::select(-orig_name),
              by = c("capsule_plot" = "new_name")) %>%
    mutate(group = case_when(
      capsule_plot == "K_neg_partial" ~ "K_neg_partial",
      capsule_plot == "Other" ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ group)) %>%
    distinct(capsule_plot, group) %>%
    dplyr::select(-capsule_plot),
  annotation_height = unit(4, "mm"),
  col = list(group = c(
    "G2A" = "#71B7E2",
    "G2B" = "#345C7B",
    "G3A" = "#7653AB",
    "G3B" = "#A48DCC",
    "K_neg_partial" = "grey",
    "Other" = "grey80"
  )),
  show_legend = TRUE,
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    group = list(direction = "horizontal", nrow = 1)
  )
)

# flip axes
#mat_A_xy <- t(mat_A)
mat_A_xy <- mat_A

# remove any all-zero rows/cols
mat_A_xy <- mat_A_xy[rowSums(mat_A_xy) > 0, colSums(mat_A_xy) > 0, drop = FALSE]

# clustering
hc_cols <- hclust(as.dist(1 - cor(mat_A_xy, method = "spearman")), method = "complete")
dend_cols <- as.dendrogram(hc_cols)

hc_rows <- dendsort(hclust(as.dist(1 - cor(t(mat_A_xy), method = "spearman")), method = "complete"))
dend_rows <- as.dendrogram(hc_rows)


# col_fun <- colorRamp2(
#   c(0, max(mat_A_xy) / 10, max(mat_A_xy)),
#   c("white", "orange", "red")
# )


library(circlize)

# col_fun <- colorRamp2(
#   c(0, max(mat_A_xy)),
#   c("#F7F7F7", "#252525")
# )

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
    c(0, max(mat_A_xy) / 10, max(mat_A_xy)),
    c("white", "orange", "red")
)

pdf(paste0(plotdir, "ED8C_ST_capsule_heatmap.pdf"), width = 8, height = 9)

hm <- Heatmap(
  mat_A_xy,
  name = "proportion",
  col = col_fun,

  cluster_columns = dend_cols,
  cluster_rows    = dend_rows,
  
  top_annotation = ha_caps,

  row_split = 6,
  column_split = 6,

  use_raster = TRUE,
  raster_quality = 5,

  row_title = NULL,
  column_title = NULL,

  rect_gp = gpar(col = "grey85", lwd = 1),
  border = "grey85",

  show_row_names = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "genomes in K-type\n(proportion)",
    direction = "horizontal"
  )
)

draw(
  hm,
  heatmap_legend_side = "top",
  annotation_legend_side = "top",
  merge_legend = TRUE
)

dev.off()

```

### ED8D - Global association strength (Cramér's V) + permutation null (shuffle capsule within phylogroup)


#### - analysis w/o kps- or partial genomes

```{r}
#remove STs with <20 genomes and kps-neg genomes
st_counts <- totest %>% filter(group != "kps -" & phylogroup != "NA" & predicted != "K_neg_partial" & mlst != "-") %>%
  count(mlst, name = "n") %>% arrange(desc(n))

st_keep <- st_counts %>%
  filter(n >= 20) %>%
  pull(mlst)


panelA <- totest %>%
  #filter(mlst != "-" & predicted != "K_neg_partial") %>%
  filter(group != "kps -" & phylogroup != "NA" & predicted != "K_neg_partial" & mlst != "-" & mlst %in% st_keep) 


caps_counts <- panelA %>% count(predicted, name = "n") %>% arrange(desc(n))
caps_keep <- caps_counts %>%
  #here cutoff on number of genomes per capsules to avoid compromising chisq assumptions with small cells - actually has no impact 
  filter(n >= 5) %>%
  pull(predicted)

panelA <- panelA %>%
  mutate(capsule_plot = if_else(predicted %in% caps_keep, predicted, "Other"))

panelA %>% group_by(source) %>%
  summarise(n())

nrow(panelA)

# Contingency table for ST x capsule_plot
ct_B <- panelA %>%
  mutate(capsule_plot = if_else(predicted %in% caps_keep, predicted, "Other")) %>%
  count(mlst, capsule_plot) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = capsule_plot, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("mlst") %>%
  as.matrix()

# Compute Cramér's V
cramers_v <- function(ct) {
  chi <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(ct, simulate.p.value = FALSE))
  n <- sum(ct)
  r <- nrow(ct); k <- ncol(ct)
  v <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi$statistic) / (n * (min(r - 1, k - 1))))
  unname(v)
}

V_obs <- cramers_v(ct_B)

# Permute capsules (stratified by phylogroup if available; else global)
permute_capsule <- function(df) {
  if (!all(is.na(df$phylogroup))) {
    df %>%
      group_by(phylogroup) %>%
      mutate(capsule_perm = sample(capsule_plot, size = n(), replace = FALSE)) %>%
      ungroup()
  } else {
    df %>% mutate(capsule_perm = sample(capsule_plot, size = n(), replace = FALSE))
  }
}

df_B <- panelA %>%
  mutate(capsule_plot = if_else(predicted %in% caps_keep, predicted, "Other"),
         genome_id = sprintf("g%06d", dplyr::row_number())) %>%
  select(genome_id, mlst, capsule_plot, phylogroup)

V_perm <- replicate(2000, {
  dfp <- permute_capsule(df_B)
  ct <- dfp %>%
    count(mlst, capsule_perm) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = capsule_perm, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
    column_to_rownames("mlst") %>%
    as.matrix()
  cramers_v(ct)
})

df_V <- tibble(
  V = c(V_obs, V_perm),
  type = c("Observed", rep("Permuted", length(V_perm)))
)

#takes a while to compute so save for fast replotting
write.table(df_V, file=paste0(outputdir,"ED8D_cramersV_permutation_nokps-.tsv"),sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, col.names=TRUE, quote=FALSE)

```


#### - including kps partial

```{r}
#remove STs with <20 genomes and kps-neg genomes
st_counts <- totest %>%
  filter(phylogroup != "NA" & manual_ktyp != "K_neg" & mlst != "-") %>%
  count(mlst, name = "n") %>% arrange(desc(n))

st_keep <- st_counts %>%
  filter(n >= 20) %>%
  pull(mlst)


panelA <- totest %>%
  #filter(mlst != "-" & predicted != "K_neg_partial") %>%
  filter(phylogroup != "NA" & manual_ktyp != "K_neg" & mlst != "-" & mlst %in% st_keep) 


caps_counts <- panelA %>% count(predicted, name = "n") %>% arrange(desc(n))
caps_keep <- caps_counts %>%
  #here cutoff on number of genomes per capsules to avoid compromising chisq assumptions with small cells - actually has no impact 
  filter(n >= 5) %>%
  pull(predicted)

panelA <- panelA %>%
  mutate(capsule_plot = if_else(predicted %in% caps_keep, predicted, "Other"))

panelA %>% group_by(source) %>%
  summarise(n())

nrow(panelA)

# Contingency table for ST x capsule_plot
ct_B <- panelA %>%
  mutate(capsule_plot = if_else(predicted %in% caps_keep, predicted, "Other")) %>%
  count(mlst, capsule_plot) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = capsule_plot, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("mlst") %>%
  as.matrix()

# Compute Cramér's V
cramers_v <- function(ct) {
  chi <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(ct, simulate.p.value = FALSE))
  n <- sum(ct)
  r <- nrow(ct); k <- ncol(ct)
  v <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi$statistic) / (n * (min(r - 1, k - 1))))
  unname(v)
}

V_obs <- cramers_v(ct_B)

# Permute capsules (stratified by phylogroup if available; else global)
permute_capsule <- function(df) {
  if (!all(is.na(df$phylogroup))) {
    df %>%
      group_by(phylogroup) %>%
      mutate(capsule_perm = sample(capsule_plot, size = n(), replace = FALSE)) %>%
      ungroup()
  } else {
    df %>% mutate(capsule_perm = sample(capsule_plot, size = n(), replace = FALSE))
  }
}

df_B <- panelA %>%
  mutate(capsule_plot = if_else(predicted %in% caps_keep, predicted, "Other"),
         genome_id = sprintf("g%06d", dplyr::row_number())) %>%
  select(genome_id, mlst, capsule_plot, phylogroup)

V_perm <- replicate(2000, {
  dfp <- permute_capsule(df_B)
  ct <- dfp %>%
    count(mlst, capsule_perm) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = capsule_perm, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
    column_to_rownames("mlst") %>%
    as.matrix()
  cramers_v(ct)
})

df_V <- tibble(
  V = c(V_obs, V_perm),
  type = c("Observed", rep("Permuted", length(V_perm)))
)

write.table(df_V, file=paste0(outputdir,"ED8D_cramersV_permutation_withkps-.tsv"),
            sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, col.names=TRUE, quote=FALSE)

```


#### - plot
```{r}

df_nokps <- read.table(paste0(outputdir, "ED8D_cramersV_permutation_nokps-.tsv"),sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

df_withkps <- read.table(paste0(outputdir, "ED8D_cramersV_permutation_withkps-.tsv"),sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

# Extract observed values
V_obs_nokps  <- df_nokps  %>% filter(type == "Observed") %>% dplyr::slice(1) %>% pull(V)
V_obs_withkps <- df_withkps %>% filter(type == "Observed") %>% dplyr::slice(1) %>% pull(V)

# Combine permutation nulls (only Permuted) for overlay
df_perm <- bind_rows(
  df_nokps %>%
    filter(type == "Permuted") %>%
    transmute(V, dataset = "no"),
  df_withkps %>%
    filter(type == "Permuted") %>%
    transmute(V, dataset = "yes")
)

# Observed lines for both
df_obs <- tibble(
  V = c(V_obs_withkps, V_obs_nokps),
  dataset = c("yes", "no"),
  label = paste0("V = ", round(c(V_obs_withkps, V_obs_nokps), 3)),
  y = c(900, 750)  # adjust based on your histogram height
)


cols <- c("no" = "grey70","yes" = "grey20")


pdf(file.path(plotdir, "ED8D_cramersV_overlay_histograms.pdf"),width = 4.5, height = 3)
ggplot(df_perm, aes(x = V, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 100,
    alpha = 0.5,
    position = "identity",
    color = "grey30"
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    data = df_obs,
    aes(xintercept = V, color = dataset),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = df_obs,
    aes(x = V, y = y, label = label, color = dataset),
    hjust = 1.1,
    size = 3.2,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols, breaks = c("yes", "no")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
 # xlim(0.2,0.6) + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  labs(x = "Cramer's V",y = "Permutation count",
      # fill = expression(paste("Including ", italic("kps"), "- genomes"))) +
       fill = expression(paste("Including genomes\nwith incomplete K-type loci: "))) +
  guides(color="none")
dev.off()

```


###ED8E - ncbi collection - compare ST similarity according to K-types w/ ST similarity according to genomes (ANI99) or environments
I can do this only for ncbi where ANI99 clusters are available.

##### - prep data

Use NCBI collection bc ANI clusters annotated to assess genetic similarity beyond STs.

```{r}
touse <- ncbi_analysis %>%
  filter(mlst != "-", predicted != "K_neg_partial") %>%
  mutate(mlst = as.character(mlst),
         genome_id = sprintf("g%06d", row_number())) %>%
  # keep only genomes with required ecology fields
  filter(
    !is.na(host_group),
    !is.na(host_common_name),
    !is.na(geographic_group),
    !is.na(isolation_source)
  ) %>%
  mutate(env =interaction(host_group, host_common_name, geographic_group, isolation_source,
                      sep = "_", drop = TRUE)) %>%
  # keep STs with at least 10 genomes
  add_count(mlst, name = "st_n") %>%
  filter(st_n >= 10)

#Filter capsules by number of STs they appear in
caps_keep <- touse %>%
  group_by(predicted) %>%
  summarise(n_st_caps = n_distinct(mlst), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_st_caps >= 4) %>%
  pull(predicted)

# Filter environments by number of STs they appear in
env_keep <- touse %>%
  group_by(env) %>%
  summarise(n_st_env = n_distinct(mlst), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_st_env >= 2) %>%
  pull(env)

#Filter ANI99 clusters by number of STs they appear in
ani_keep <- touse %>%
  group_by(ANI99) %>%
  summarise(n_st_ani = n_distinct(mlst), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_st_ani >= 2) %>%
  pull(ANI99)


touse <- touse %>%
  filter(predicted %in% caps_keep,
         env %in% env_keep,
         ANI99 %in% ani_keep)


nrow(touse)

st_sizes <- touse %>%
  count(mlst, name = "n_genomes") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_genomes))

# calculate jaccard from ST x feature incidence matrix
jaccard_from_incidence <- function(inc_df, st_col = "mlst") {
  stopifnot(!anyDuplicated(inc_df[[st_col]]))
  st_names <- inc_df[[st_col]]
  X <- as.matrix(dplyr::select(inc_df, -all_of(st_col)))
  rownames(X) <- st_names

  X_bin <- X > 0
  A <- X_bin %*% t(X_bin)
  rs <- rowSums(X_bin)
  U <- outer(rs, rs, `+`) - A
  J <- A / U
  diag(J) <- 1
  J
}

# capsule similarity matrix
inc_caps <- touse %>%
  distinct(mlst, predicted) %>%
  mutate(val = 1L) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = predicted, values_from = val, values_fill = 0L)

J_caps <- jaccard_from_incidence(inc_caps, "mlst")

# environment similarity matrix
inc_env <- touse %>%
  distinct(mlst, env) %>%
  mutate(val = 1L) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = env, values_from = val, values_fill = 0L)

J_env <- jaccard_from_incidence(inc_env, "mlst")

# ANI99 similarity matrix
inc_gen <- touse %>%
  distinct(mlst, ANI99) %>%
  mutate(val = 1L) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = ANI99, values_from = val, values_fill = 0L)

J_gen <- jaccard_from_incidence(inc_gen, "mlst")

keep <- st_sizes$mlst
keep <- Reduce(intersect, list(keep, rownames(J_caps), rownames(J_env), rownames(J_gen)))

J_plot <- J_caps[keep, keep, drop = FALSE]
J_env  <- J_env[keep, keep, drop = FALSE]
J_gen  <- J_gen[keep, keep, drop = FALSE]


# ensure no NA/NaN in similarity matrices
stopifnot(all(is.finite(J_plot)), all(is.finite(J_env)), all(is.finite(J_gen)))

# check fraction of zero overlap (should not be ~0 for env anymore)
mean(J_env[upper.tri(J_env)] == 0)
mean(J_gen[upper.tri(J_gen)] == 0)

```


#### - Capsule sharing across STs - similarity matrix

```{r}
edges_bi <- touse %>%
  select(genome_id, mlst, predicted) %>%
  count(mlst, predicted, name = "w")

#Incidence matrix: ST x capsule (0/1)
inc <- edges_bi %>%
  mutate(val = 1L) %>%
  select(mlst, predicted, val) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = predicted,
    values_from = val,
    values_fill = 0L
  )

stopifnot(!anyDuplicated(inc$mlst))

st_names <- inc$mlst
X <- as.matrix(select(inc, -mlst))
rownames(X) <- st_names

# Jaccard similarity between ST rows
X_bin <- X > 0
A <- X_bin %*% t(X_bin)                 # intersections
rs <- rowSums(X_bin)
U <- outer(rs, rs, `+`) - A             # unions
J <- A / U
diag(J) <- 1


# Pick top N STs by genomes for heatmap
#TOP_N <- 40
keep <- st_sizes %>%
  arrange(desc(n_genomes)) %>%
  #slice_head(n = TOP_N) %>%
  pull(mlst)

keep <- intersect(keep, rownames(J))
J_plot <- J[keep, keep, drop = FALSE]


```



#### - Ecological similarity

```{r}

# Incidence ST x env
inc_env <- touse %>%
  distinct(mlst, env) %>%
  mutate(val = 1L) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = env, values_from = val, values_fill = 0L)

stopifnot(!anyDuplicated(inc_env$mlst))

st_names <- inc_env$mlst
X <- as.matrix(select(inc_env, -mlst))
rownames(X) <- st_names

# Jaccard similarity
X_bin <- X > 0
A <- X_bin %*% t(X_bin)
rs <- rowSums(X_bin)
U <- outer(rs, rs, `+`) - A
J_env <- A / U
diag(J_env) <- 1

# keep same ST ordering as your capsule/gen matrices
keep <- st_sizes %>% arrange(desc(n_genomes)) %>% pull(mlst)
keep <- intersect(keep, rownames(J_env))
J_env <- J_env[keep, keep, drop = FALSE]

```

####- Genetic similarity (ANI99)

```{r}
edges_bi <- touse %>%
  select(genome_id, ANI99, mlst) %>%
  count(mlst, ANI99, name = "w")

#Incidence matrix: ST x capsule (0/1)

inc <- edges_bi %>%
  mutate(val = 1L) %>%
  select(mlst, ANI99, val) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = ANI99,
    values_from = val,
    values_fill = 0L
  )

stopifnot(!anyDuplicated(inc$mlst))

st_names <- inc$mlst
X <- as.matrix(select(inc, -mlst))
rownames(X) <- st_names

# Jaccard similarity between ST rows

X_bin <- X > 0
A <- X_bin %*% t(X_bin)                 # intersections
rs <- rowSums(X_bin)
U <- outer(rs, rs, `+`) - A             # unions
J <- A / U
diag(J) <- 1


# Pick top N STs by genomes for heatmap
#TOP_N <- 40
keep <- st_sizes %>%
  arrange(desc(n_genomes)) %>%
  #slice_head(n = TOP_N) %>%
  pull(mlst)

keep <- intersect(keep, rownames(J))
J_gen <- J[keep, keep, drop = FALSE]

```


#### - Compare the Jaccard matrices (capsule vs env or vs gen)
```{r}

# compare off-diagonal entries only
get_offdiag <- function(M) M[upper.tri(M)]

# capsule vs environment
cor(get_offdiag(J_plot), get_offdiag(J_env), method = "spearman")
mantel(as.dist(1 - J_plot), as.dist(1 - J_env), method = "spearman", permutations = 9999)

# capsule vs ANI99
cor(get_offdiag(J_plot), get_offdiag(J_gen), method = "spearman")
mantel(as.dist(1 - J_plot), as.dist(1 - J_gen), method = "spearman", permutations = 9999)


```

#### - Figure

```{r}

# Capsule vs ecology
mantel_env <- mantel(
  as.dist(1 - J_plot),
  as.dist(1 - J_env),
  method = "spearman",
  permutations = 9999
)

# Capsule vs genome
mantel_gen <- mantel(
  as.dist(1 - J_plot),
  as.dist(1 - J_gen),
  method = "spearman",
  permutations = 9999
)


# Combine permutation nulls
df_mantel <- bind_rows(
  tibble(rho = mantel_env$perm, comparison = "Capsule vs ecology"),
  tibble(rho = mantel_gen$perm, comparison = "Capsule vs 99% ANI")
)

# Observed statistics
df_obs <- tibble(
  rho = c(mantel_env$statistic, mantel_gen$statistic),
  comparison = c("Capsule vs ecology", "Capsule vs 99% ANI")
)


#write these down to avoid recomputing
write.table(df_mantel, file=paste0(outputdir,"ED6E_mantel_permutation.tsv"),sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, col.names=TRUE, quote=FALSE)

write.table(df_obs, file=paste0(outputdir,"ED6E_mantel_observed.tsv"),sep="\t", row.names=FALSE, col.names=TRUE, quote=FALSE)

#read these back
df_mantel <- read.table(paste0(outputdir,"ED6E_mantel_permutation.tsv"),sep = "\t", header = TRUE)
df_obs <- read.table(paste0(outputdir,"ED6E_mantel_observed.tsv"),sep = "\t", header = TRUE)


pdf(paste0(plotdir, "ED8E_mantel_overlay_histograms.pdf"), width = 4.5, height = 3)

ggplot(df_mantel, aes(x = rho, fill = comparison)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(fill=comparison),bins = 100,alpha = 0.5,position = "identity") +
  geom_vline(data = df_obs,
             aes(xintercept = rho, color = comparison),
             linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_text(data = df_obs, aes(x = rho+0.15,y = 450,label = paste0("r = ", round(rho, 3)),
                               color = comparison),
            vjust = -0.4,hjust = 1.1,size = 3.2,show.legend = FALSE) +
  # scale_fill_manual(values = c("Capsule vs ecology" = "#1B9E77",
  #                              "Capsule vs 99% ANI" = "#D95F02")) +
  # scale_color_manual(values = c("Capsule vs ecology" = "#1B9E77",
  #                               "Capsule vs 99% ANI" = "#D95F02")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Capsule vs ecology" = "orange",
                               "Capsule vs 99% ANI" = "grey10")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Capsule vs ecology" = "orange",
                                "Capsule vs 99% ANI" = "grey10")) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Mantel Spearman's r",
       y = "Permutation count",
       fill="ST similarity comparison") +
  guides(color="none") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.title.position = "top", legend.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))

dev.off()

```



## ED Fig. 9

##### load annotation O-types
```{r}
processed_sugars = fread(paste0(inputdir,"Final_Processed_O-Antigen_Data.csv")) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(o_type = sub(" .*", "", o_antigen)) %>%  # remove after space
  distinct(o_type, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(sugar = case_when(o_type == "O25" ~ "aDGlc|aLFucNAc|bDGlcNAc|aLRha",
                           TRUE ~ sugar))

```

##### prep data - same as fig. 4C
NCBI + Egli + gutmags

```{r}
### prep ncbi data
ncbi_analysis = read.xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"ncbi_annotated_derep_260112.xlsx")) %>% 
  filter(host_group == "Human" & host_common_name == "Human" & !(isolation_source %in% c("Food","Probiotic","Sewage and wastewater","Meat","Plant"))) %>%
  mutate(isolation_source = case_when(!(isolation_source %in% c("Stool","Urine and bladder", "Blood","Brain and CSF")) ~ "Other body sites",
                                      TRUE ~ isolation_source),
         host_health = case_when(host_health %in% c("asymptomatic bacteriuria", "Urinary Tract Infection", "recurrent uti") | isolation_source == "Urine and bladder" ~ "UTI",
                                 host_health %in% c("Bloodstream Infection", "neonatal bacteremia") | isolation_source == "Blood" ~ "BSI",
                                 host_health %in% c("Meningitis") | isolation_source == "Brain and CSF" ~ "Meningitis",
                                 host_health %in% c("GI Tract and Diarrhoea", "HUS and TTP", "STEC/Shigella/EHEC") ~ "InPEC",
                                 host_health == "Healthy" & isolation_source == "Stool" ~ "Healthy (stool)",
                                 host_health == "Healthy" & isolation_source != "Stool"~ "Healthy (other)",
                                 TRUE ~ "Other disease")) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  #add genome id column for merging with other datasets - after dereplication we didn't have it anymore
  mutate(genome_id = row_number(),
        group = case_when(predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group)) #%>%
 # dplyr::select(genome_id, predicted, host_health,host_age,geographic_group, host_gender, group)

# prep healthy gut MAGs
gutmags = readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"gutmags_annotated_metad_ectyper.xlsx")) %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(predicted %in% c("No KpsC identified", "No K-type assigned") ~ predicted,
                           predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group),
         phylogroup = case_when(phylogroup == "C_original" ~"C",
                                TRUE ~ phylogroup)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  # dplyr::select(genome_id,predicted, host_health,host_age, host_gender, geographic_group, group) %>%
    mutate(host_health = "MAGs")


# prep egli collection
egli = readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(outputdir,"egli_annotated_metad_ectyper.xlsx")) %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "kps -",
                           TRUE ~ group),
         host_health = case_when(invasiveness=="invasive" ~ "BSI",
                                                 TRUE ~ "UTI")) #%>%
  #dplyr::select(predicted, host_gender, host_health,host_age,geographic_group, group)


common_cols <- intersect(intersect(names(ncbi_analysis), names(egli)), names(gutmags))
totest <- gdata::combine(ncbi_analysis[common_cols], egli[common_cols], gutmags[common_cols])

totest = totest %>%
  filter(mlst !="-") %>%
  mutate(mlst = gsub("\\.0","",mlst))

#-------- harmonise O types
# Function to sort components of serotype strings
harmonize_serotype <- function(x) {
  if (grepl("/", x)) {
    parts <- unlist(strsplit(x, "/"))
    parts <- sort(parts)
    return(paste(parts, collapse = "/"))
  } else {
    return(x)
  }
}

totest$o_type <- sapply(totest$o_type, harmonize_serotype)

totest %>% group_by(source) %>%
  summarise(count=n())

```


### ED9A - K-type/O-type proportions


```{r}

# filter and assign rare h_types as "Other"
totest_filtered <- totest %>%
  filter(manual_ktyp == "K_pos") %>%
  group_by(o_type) %>%
  mutate(no_genomes = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(no_genomes > 25) %>%
  group_by(o_type, h_type) %>%
  mutate(frac = n() / dplyr::first(no_genomes)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(h_type = ifelse(frac < 0.3, "Other", h_type))


# assign each (o_type, K-type) to one h_type only
k_assignments <- totest_filtered %>%
  distinct(o_type, predicted, h_type) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(o_type, predicted) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1) %>%  # Assign each K-type to just one H-type per O-type
  ungroup()

# count unique K-types per (o_type, h_type)
toplot <- k_assignments %>%
  group_by(o_type, h_type) %>%
  summarise(unique_ktypes = n(), .groups = "drop")


# get genome counts per o_type for bar labels
bar_labels <- totest_filtered %>%
  dplyr::group_by(o_type) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(no_genomes = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(
    toplot %>%
      group_by(o_type) %>%
      summarise(total_height = sum(unique_ktypes), .groups = "drop"),
    by = "o_type"
  )


h_types <- unique(toplot$h_type)
non_other_h <- setdiff(h_types, "Other")
palette_colors <- hcl.colors(length(non_other_h), palette = "Dynamic")
mycolors <- setNames(c(palette_colors, "grey"),
                     c(non_other_h, "Other"))

toplot <- toplot %>%
  left_join(bar_labels %>% select(o_type, total_height), by = "o_type")


# upper panel
pdf(paste0(plotdir,"ED9A_upperpanel_OKtype_barplot_normgenomes.pdf"),width=10,height=5)
ggplot(toplot, aes(x = reorder(o_type, -total_height),
                   y = unique_ktypes, fill = h_type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = bar_labels,
            aes(x = o_type, y = total_height + 4, label = no_genomes),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = mycolors,
                    guide = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  labs(x = "O-type",
       y = "Unique K-types per O-type",
       fill = "H-type") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10))

dev.off()


# lower panel (kps+ / - )
toplot = toplot %>% 
  mutate(o_type = reorder(o_type, -total_height))
desired_order <- levels(toplot$o_type)


toplot = totest %>%
  mutate(manual_ktyp = case_when(manual_ktyp == "K_neg" ~ "-",
                             TRUE ~ "+")) %>%
  filter(o_type %in% toplot$o_type) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(o_type) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total=n()) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(total, o_type, manual_ktyp) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(proportion = (count/total)*100)



toplot$o_type <- factor(toplot$o_type, levels = desired_order)


pdf(paste0(plotdir,"ED9A_lowerpanel_O_type_kps+.pdf"),width = 10,height=5)
ggplot(toplot, aes(x = o_type, y = proportion, fill = manual_ktyp, label = count)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(y = proportion),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),angle = 90,
            size = 3, 
            color = "black",
            check_overlap = TRUE) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("white", "grey"), labels = c("-", "+")) +
 # coord_flip() +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1,angle =60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "right") +
  labs(y = "% genomes", x = "", fill = "Capsule")


dev.off()



```

###ED9B - O-type-K-type heatmap


```{r}
test = totest %>%
  filter(manual_ktyp == "K_pos" &  o_type != "-") 

nrow(test)

test = test %>%
  dplyr::group_by(predicted) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total = n()) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(predicted, o_type, total) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(proportion = count / total) %>%
  distinct(predicted, o_type, proportion) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = predicted, values_from = proportion)

test[is.na(test)] <- 0

mat_data = test %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  column_to_rownames("o_type") %>%
  as.matrix()

# Remove rows/columns with all 0
mat_data <- mat_data[rowSums(mat_data != 0) > 0, colSums(mat_data != 0) > 0]

# dendrograms
hc <- hclust(as.dist(1 - cor(mat_data, method = "spearman")), method = "complete")
hr <- dendsort(hclust(as.dist(1 - cor(t(mat_data), method = "spearman")), method = "complete"))

dend1 <- as.dendrogram(hc)
type <- colnames(mat_data)

# k-type group annotation
ha = HeatmapAnnotation(
  df = data.frame(predicted = type) %>%
    left_join(Kgroups %>% dplyr::select(-orig_name), by = c("predicted" = "new_name")) %>%
    mutate(group = case_when(predicted == "K_neg_partial" ~ "K_neg_partial", TRUE ~ group)) %>%
    distinct(predicted, group) %>%
    dplyr::select(-predicted),
  annotation_height = unit(4, "mm"),
  col = list(group = c("G2A" = "#71B7E2", "G2B" = "#345C7B", "G3A" = "#7653AB", "G3B" = "#A48DCC", "K_neg_partial" = "grey")),
   show_legend = TRUE
)

# sugar annotation

# get brooader sugar groups (Tim's version abbreviations)
group_definitions <- list(
  Rha = c("aLRha", "bLRha"),
  GlcNAc = c("bDGlcNAc", "aDGlcNAc"),
  Gal = c("aDGal", "bDGal"),
  GalNAc = c("aDGalNAc", "bDGalNAc"),
  Glc = c("aDGlc", "bDGlc"),
  Man = c("aDMan", "bDMan"),
  Fuc = c("aLFuc", "bLFuc"),
  HexA = c("GlcA", "GalA"),
  Rare_sugars = c("QuiNAc", "Tyv", "Abe")
)

# assign groups based on sugars
assign_sugar_groups <- function(sugar_string) {
  sugars <- unlist(strsplit(sugar_string, "\\|"))
  matched_groups <- sapply(names(group_definitions), function(group) {
    if (any(sugars %in% group_definitions[[group]])) return(group) else return(NULL)
  })
  paste(na.omit(unlist(matched_groups)), collapse = "; ")
}

processed_sugars$sugar_group <- sapply(processed_sugars$sugar, assign_sugar_groups)

sugar_data <- processed_sugars %>%
   dplyr::select(o_type, sugar_group) %>%
   rename(sugar = sugar_group)


# prep sugar abbreviated annotation 
sugar_ann <- data.frame(o_type = rownames(mat_data)) %>%
  left_join(sugar_data, by = "o_type") %>%
  mutate(sugar = ifelse(is.na(sugar), "Unknown", sugar)) %>%
# some are not present bc ECtyper gives comprehensive annotation not present in this document --> integrate
  mutate(sugar=case_when(grepl("O106", o_type) ~ "GlcN; Man",
                          o_type == "O107/O117" ~ "Rha; GlcN; Gal",
                        o_type == "O13/O135" ~ 	"Rha; GlcN",
                        o_type == "O2/O50" ~ 	"Rha; GlcN",
                        o_type == "O142/O157" ~ 	"Rha; Gal; Glc; Fuc",
                         o_type == "O62" ~ "D-Galf",
                        o_type == "O89" ~ "Unknown",
                        TRUE ~ sugar))


unique_sugars <- unique(sugar_ann$sugar)
sugar_colors <- setNames(rainbow(length(unique_sugars)), unique_sugars)

library(viridis)
sugar_colors <- setNames(viridis(length(unique_sugars), option = "turbo"), unique_sugars)

sugar_color_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  sugar_color = sugar_ann$sugar,
  col = list(sugar_color = sugar_colors),
  annotation_width = unit(4, "mm"),
  show_legend = TRUE
)

sugar_label_anno <- rowAnnotation(
  sugar_label = anno_text(sugar_ann$sugar, just = "left", gp = gpar(fontsize = 8)),
  annotation_width = unit(30, "mm")
)

rownames(sugar_ann) <- sugar_ann$o_type
sugar_ann <- sugar_ann[rownames(mat_data), ]

row_ha <- rowAnnotation(
  sugar_color = sugar_ann$sugar,
  sugar_label = anno_text(sugar_ann$sugar, just = "left", gp = gpar(fontsize = 11)),
  col = list(sugar_color = sugar_colors),
  annotation_width = unit.c(unit(4, "mm"), unit(50, "mm")),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE,
  show_legend = c(sugar_color = FALSE) 
)


col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(0, max(mat_data) / 10, max(mat_data)),
  c("white", "orange", "red")
)

# plot
pdf(paste0(plotdir, "ED9B_clustered_OK.pdf"), width = 19, height = 16)


hm <- Heatmap(mat_data,
        cluster_columns = dend1,
        col = col_fun,
        top_annotation = ha,
        left_annotation = row_ha,
        row_split = 10, column_split = 6,
        use_raster = TRUE, raster_quality = 5,
        row_title = NULL,
        column_title = NULL,
        border = "grey80",
        rect_gp = gpar(col = "grey90", lwd = 3),
        heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "proportion genomes\nin K-type"))


draw(hm,
     heatmap_legend_side = "right",
     annotation_legend_side = "right",
     merge_legend = TRUE)


dev.off()


```


##### for text

```{r}
harmonize_serotype <- function(x) {
  if (grepl("/", x)) {
    parts <- unlist(strsplit(x, "/"))
    parts <- sort(parts)
    return(paste(parts, collapse = "/"))
  } else {
    return(x)
  }
}

totest$o_type <- sapply(totest$o_type, harmonize_serotype)

test = totest %>%
  filter(predicted != "K_neg_partial" & o_type != "-") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(predicted) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total = n()) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(predicted, o_type, total) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(proportion = count / total) %>%
  distinct(predicted, o_type, proportion) 

# Assign sugar groups
assign_sugar_groups <- function(sugar_string) {
    sugars <- unlist(strsplit(sugar_string, "\\|"))
    matched_groups <- sapply(names(group_definitions), function(group) {
        if (any(sugars %in% group_definitions[[group]])) return(group) else return(NULL)
    })
    paste(na.omit(unlist(matched_groups)), collapse = "; ")
}

processed_sugars$sugar_group <- sapply(processed_sugars$sugar, assign_sugar_groups)




# Align sugar annotations
test <- test %>%
    left_join(processed_sugars, by = "o_type") %>%
  mutate(sugar_group = case_when(
        grepl("O106", o_type) ~ "Glucosamine; Mannose",
        o_type == "O107/O117" ~ "Rhamnose; Glucosamine; Galactose",
        o_type == "O13/O135" ~ "Rhamnose; Glucosamine",
        o_type == "O2/O50" ~ "Rhamnose; Glucosamine",
        o_type == "O142/O157" ~ "Rhamnose; Galactose; Glucose; Fucose",
        o_type == "O62" ~ "D-galactofuranose",
        o_type == "O89" ~ "Unknown",
        TRUE ~ sugar_group
    ))


    

```
